settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Select the display language for the application

dashboard.title: Warehouse Overview
dashboard.description: Monitor stock status and import activities
dashboard.helpText: The overview page displays summary data: total stock value, today's revenue, recently imported/sold products. Helps you quickly grasp business performance.

products.title: Product Management
products.description: View, edit and print barcodes for products
products.helpText: List of all products in stock. You can search, filter by category, print barcodes, adjust quantities or delete products. Products are created automatically when importing.
products.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, SKU or IMEI...

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Monitor and track inventory in real-time
inventory.helpText: View detailed inventory by branch, IMEI status (selling, sold, warranty). Supports stock counting and reconciliation with actual quantities.
inventory.rememberExport: Remember to export to Excel daily to back up data!
inventory.rememberExportDesc: Data is securely stored in the cloud and cannot be lost, but export to Excel daily for easier recovery in case of any risk.
inventory.exportReimportDesc: Exported {{count}} products in import template format

categories.title: Category Management
categories.helpText: Create a category tree to classify products (e.g., Phones > iPhone, Samsung). Categories help filter and search products faster in import/export receipts.
categories.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete category

importNew.title: Create Import Receipt
importNew.description: Import goods manually or from Excel
importNew.helpText: Create a new import receipt: select supplier, add products (enter IMEI, name, price), pay to complete the receipt. Supports Excel import.
importNew.searchProductPlaceholder: Enter product name to search or add new
importNew.searchProductHint: Search existing products or add new ones.
importNew.skuHint: Abbreviated product name for easy search. You can copy the product name (press **A→** button).
importNew.imeiHint: Only enter for devices with **IMEI** or **Serial** (phones, laptops, cameras…). For accessories (cables, chargers, parts…) → **skip**.
importNew.quantityImeiHint: Devices with **IMEI / Serial** → default 1 (each has unique code).
importNew.quantityBatchHint: Accessories **without** IMEI / Serial → can import in batch.
importNew.notePlaceholder: e.g., battery 95%, 300 charge cycles, no Face ID...
importNew.noteHint: Note specific product condition for easy consultation (e.g., battery 95%, 300 charges, no Face ID...)
importNew.imeiDuplicateCartDesc: IMEI "{{imei}}" has already been added to the import cart
importNew.imeiExistsDesc: Product "{{name}}" ({{sku}}) has IMEI "{{imei}}" with status: {{status}}. Cannot import duplicate.
importNew.cartEmptyDesc: Please add products to cart before payment
importNew.templateDownloadedDesc: Sample Excel file has been downloaded
importNew.importBatchErrorDesc: Cannot create receipts. Please try again.

importHistory.title: Import History
importHistory.helpText: List of all import receipts. View details, edit, cancel receipts or export to Excel.

exportNew.title: Create Sales Receipt
exportNew.helpText: Create a sales receipt by scanning barcodes or searching for products. Select customers, apply discounts, then pay and print invoices.
exportNew.searchHint: **IMEI/Serial:** Enter exact code → Enter → product appears | **Name:** Type 2-3 chars → suggestions appear
exportNew.scanBarcodeHint: Scan barcode with price → auto-add to cart with warranty below.
exportNew.salesStaffNote: Sales revenue will be attributed to this staff member
exportNew.alreadyInCartDesc: This product is already in the cart
exportNew.enterSalePriceHint: Please enter sale price and click "Add to Cart"
exportNew.enterWarrantyHint: Please enter warranty and click "Add to Cart"
exportNew.errorValidPrice: Please enter a valid sale price
exportNew.emptyCartErrorDesc: Please add products to the cart
exportNew.missingCustomerInfo: Please enter customer name and phone number

exportHistory.title: Sales History
exportHistory.helpText: List of all sales receipts. View details, reprint invoices, process returns.

suppliers.title: Supplier Management
suppliers.helpText: Manage supplier list: add new, edit info, view debts. Suppliers are linked to import receipts to track sourcing and debts.
suppliers.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete supplier

customers.title: Customers & CRM
customers.helpText: Manage customer information, track purchase history, loyalty points, schedule care activities and classify customers by groups/tags. CRM helps maintain good customer relationships.

debt.title: Debt Management
debt.description: Track and manage customer and supplier debts
debt.helpText: Track amounts owed by customers (credit sales) and owed to suppliers (credit purchases). Record partial payments, view detailed payment history.

reports.title: Reports
reports.helpText: View detailed reports on revenue, profit, best sellers, staff performance and supplier status. Filter by time period and export to Excel.

cashBook.title: Cash Book
cashBook.description: Manage income, expenses and cash flow
cashBook.helpText: Record all financial transactions: cash, bank transfer, e-wallet. Track balances, reconcile at end of day.

branches.title: Branch Management
branches.helpText: Create and manage branches: add new, edit info, set default branch. Assign staff permissions by branch.
branches.confirmDeleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The branch will be permanently removed.
branches.branchInUse: Branch is in use and cannot be deleted
branches.forbidden: You do not have permission to delete branches

auth.title: Easy & Detailed Warehouse Management
auth.storeIdHint: Enter your registered store ID (no dots)
auth.wrongCredentials: Store ID, email or password is incorrect
auth.storeLockedDesc: This store has been locked. Please contact support.
auth.switchedStoreDesc: You are logged in to a different store. Please log in again with the correct store ID.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Create accounts and assign staff permissions
users.helpText: Create staff accounts, assign roles (Admin, Staff, Accountant), manage access permissions by branch.
users.staffReviewsHelp: View reviews submitted by customers after warranty lookups.
users.name: Name
users.secretModeNote: When set to "Private", all accounts in the store will not see tax and e-invoice features.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Track all changes in the system
auditLogs.helpText: Records all user actions: create/edit/delete receipts, price changes, logins... Helps with control and transparency.
auditLogs.featureTitle: Feature Purpose: Prevent Loss & Staff Monitoring
auditLogs.transparentMonitoringDesc: Records all actions: imports, sales, quantity adjustments, cash transactions...
auditLogs.anomalyDetectionDesc: Red flags on sensitive actions: delete receipts, edit cash book, adjust inventory
auditLogs.detailedTracingDesc: Compare "Before vs After" for each change - who changed what, when, old/new values
auditLogs.accountabilityDesc: Each action is tied to a specific staff member - cannot be denied or deleted
auditLogs.auditNote: Audit logs cannot be deleted or modified. All actions are permanently stored to ensure transparency and prevent fraud.

returns.title: Returns Management
returns.description: Process customer returns and supplier returns
returns.helpText: Manage returns: customers returning products (sales returns) or returning goods to suppliers (purchase returns).
returns.importReturnHelp: Return defective or wrong products to supplier. Select original import receipt and products to return. System auto-updates inventory and debts.
returns.exportReturnHelp: Process customer product returns. Select original sales receipt and products, stock is auto-restored and refund recorded.
returns.historyDesc: View return history for imports and sales
returns.historyHelp: View all return history: supplier returns and customer returns. Filter by date and return type for reconciliation.
returns.searchPlaceholder: Search by receipt code, IMEI, SKU, product name, customer, supplier...
returns.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete receipt {{code}} ({{name}})? The system will revert product status, cash book and log the action.

stockTransfer.title: Inter-Branch Transfer
stockTransfer.description: Manage stock transfer requests between branches
stockTransfer.helpText: Create and approve stock transfer requests between branches. Track the status of each transfer.

invoiceTemplate.title: Invoice Template Setup
invoiceTemplate.description: Each branch has its own invoice template with different addresses
invoiceTemplate.helpText: Customize invoice templates per branch: logo, store name, address, phone, notes. Choose paper size (K57, K80, A4) for your printer.

eInvoice.title: E-Invoice
eInvoice.description: Manage and issue electronic invoices connected to tax authorities
eInvoice.helpText: Connect with e-invoice providers to issue VAT invoices. Configure business info, tax ID, then create invoices from sales receipts.
eInvoice.notEnabledDesc: The E-Invoice feature has not been enabled for your store. Please contact your administrator for activation.
eInvoice.cancelInvoiceDesc: You are canceling invoice {{series}}/{{number}}. This action will be sent to tax authorities and cannot be undone.
eInvoice.cancelReasonRequired: Please enter a reason for cancellation
eInvoice.totalRevenueDesc: Total value of successfully issued invoices

subscription.title: Subscription Plans
subscription.helpText: View current plan, renew or upgrade. Pay via bank transfer. Expired plans will have limited features.
subscription.feedbackDesc: For any feedback or feature requests, please contact us through the channels below
subscription.noContactInfo: No contact information available. Please contact platform admin.
subscription.usingFreeLifetime: You are using the free lifetime plan, no purchase required (includes ads)
subscription.confirmCancelPayment: Are you sure you want to cancel this payment request?
subscription.canCreateNew: You can create a new payment request
subscription.cancelToBuy: Cancel it to select a different plan.
subscription.defaultPlan: 📌 Default plan — switches to this after trial expires
subscription.followInstructions: Please transfer according to the instructions
subscription.paypalInstructions: Send money to the PayPal email below
subscription.qrInstructions: Scan QR code or transfer manually
subscription.paypalNote1: 📌 Send money to the PayPal email above with the exact amount and content.
subscription.paypalNote2: ⏳ After sending, click "I have paid" — admin will verify and activate your plan.
subscription.bankWarning: ⚠️ Please enter the exact transfer content for automatic processing.

advertisements.title: App / Ad Management
advertisements.description: Add, edit, delete and sort advertisement banners
advertisements.helpText: Create and manage ad banners displayed in the Applications page. Set links, display duration, priority order.

landingPage.title: Sales Website
landingPage.helpText: Set up a public sales website: products, news, warranty lookup. Customers can access via subdomain or your custom domain.

applications.title: Apps & Services
applications.helpText: List of useful partner apps and services for your business. Click to access directly.

affiliate.title: Affiliate Program
affiliate.description: Refer new customers and earn commissions
affiliate.helpText: Share referral links to invite new users to register on vkho.vn. When they purchase a plan, you earn commission. Track clicks, signups and earnings.

platformAdmin.title: Platform Administration
platformAdmin.description: Manage businesses, service plans and payments
platformAdmin.exportAllDesc: Export all data from all stores (tenants) into a single JSON file for syncing to another database.
platformAdmin.exportAllNote1: Includes all tables: tenants, branches, products, customers, receipts, cash_book, audit_logs, etc.
platformAdmin.exportAllNote2: Not limited by store — exports the entire project.
platformAdmin.exportAllNote3: JSON file can be imported into another database using SQL Editor or migration scripts.
platformAdmin.exportWarning: ⚠️ The export process may take a few minutes for large datasets

platformAuth.title: Platform Administration
platformAuth.notAdmin: Your account is not a Platform Admin.
platformAuth.loginError: An error occurred while logging in
platformAuth.adminOnly: This page is for system administrators only

checklist.branchDesc: Create branches/stores to manage inventory by location
checklist.importDesc: Import goods to start managing inventory (categories created during import)
checklist.categoryDesc: Classify products for easier management (e.g., iPhone, Samsung, Accessories...)
checklist.exportDesc: Sell products to customers and print receipts
checklist.customerDesc: Save customer info to track purchase history
checklist.productDesc: View imported products, edit sale prices
checklist.supplierDesc: Add supplier info to track sourcing and debts
checklist.landingDesc: Create a website for your store, free warranty lookup

common.name: Name
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
common.allItemsSoldOrReturned: All products in this receipt have been sold or returned previously.
common.noCashBookImpact: This transaction will not affect cash book
common.sumSaleMinusImport: Σ(Sale Price - Import Price) per product
common.overdueDaysDesc: Debts exceeding this number of days will be marked 'Overdue'
common.transferDesc: Transfer between payment sources within or across branches

exportHistory.noReceipts: No sales receipts yet. Create your first sale!
exportHistory.noProducts: No products sold yet. Create your first sale!
exportHistory.alreadyReturnedDesc: This product has already been returned

exportHistory.receiptTabDesc: This tab lists each **sales receipt**. Click on **receipt code** to view order details.
exportHistory.actionBtnDesc:
Each receipt has 3 action buttons:
• 👁️ **View Details** — view products, customers, payment
• 🖨️ **Print Invoice** — print using configured template
• 🔄 **Return** — process full order return
exportHistory.itemTabDesc: View each **sold product** with IMEI, sale price, customer. Quick search or **return** individual items.
exportHistory.returnBtnDesc: Each product row has a **"Return"** button to process individual returns. Returned products will show a **"Returned"** badge.
exportHistory.receiptTabInfoDesc: After you **create a sales receipt**, this tab will display the list of orders. You can view details, print invoices or process returns from here.
exportHistory.itemTabInfoDesc: When you **sell products**, each item will appear in this tab. You can search by IMEI, customer name and return individual items.

cashBook.introDesc: This is where you manage all **cash** and **transfer** transactions. Each income/expense entry automatically updates the **balance**.
cashBook.tabsDesc: Switch between **Total Cash Book** (view all system funds) and **By Branch** (view specific branch). Visible to Super Admin only.
cashBook.openingBalanceDesc: If you already have funds before using the software, click **"Opening Balance"** to enter **initial amounts** for each source (**Cash**, **Bank Card**, **E-Wallet**...).
cashBook.incomeDesc: When receiving payment from customers, create an **Income Receipt** to record **money in**.
cashBook.expenseDesc: When paying for imports, expenses, salaries... create an **Expense Receipt** to record **money out**.
cashBook.filterDesc: Quickly select **Today** / **Yesterday** / **This Week**... to view **inflows – outflows** for any period. Balance history also updates based on this filter.
cashBook.historyDesc: Records **end-of-day balance** for the entire fund. Click to expand and see daily **income – expense – remaining balance**. Export to Excel for reporting.
cashBook.detailDesc: Filter transactions by **date**, **category**, **source**, **staff**. Click "Filter" for more options. **Export Excel** for reports.
cashBook.autoUpdateDesc: Every time you create an **income/expense receipt**, the fund balance updates **automatically** in real-time. You can track **cash flow** anytime.

importHistory.receiptTabDesc: This tab lists each **import receipt**. Click on **receipt code** to view products inside.
importHistory.menuBtnDesc:
Click **"⋯"** at the end of each row to open action menu:
• 👁️ **View Details** — view all products in receipt
• ✏️ **Edit** — edit date, supplier, note
• 🔄 **Return** — create return receipt to supplier
importHistory.receiptTabInfoDesc: After you **create an import receipt**, this tab will list each receipt. You can view details, edit or return goods to supplier from here.
importHistory.productTabDesc: View each **imported product** with full IMEI, price, status. Filter by category, supplier, status...
importHistory.productActionDesc:
Each inventory row has buttons:
• ✏️ **Edit** — edit product info
• 🔄 **Return** — return product to supplier
• 🔑 **Warranty** — mark for warranty (IMEI items only)
• 🔀 **Transfer** — transfer product to another branch

You can also **select multiple products** and click **Transfer Stock** on the top bar for bulk transfer.
importHistory.productTabInfoDesc: When you **import goods**, products will appear in this tab. You can filter, search, edit info and perform actions on individual products.

inventory.tourDesc1: This is the **Inventory** management page — where you track all goods in your store in real-time.
inventory.tourDesc2: After **importing goods**, the product list will appear here with full info: **name**, **SKU**, **branch**, **stock quantity**. If no products yet, go to **Import** to add first!
inventory.tourDesc3: On mobile, the table has hidden columns. Use your finger to **swipe right** on the table to see more info like **import price**, **total imported**, **sold**.
inventory.tourDesc4: Each row has an **"IMEI"** or **"Details"** button to open a popup with all info: **IMEI list**, **import price**, **sale price**, **status** of each unit.
inventory.tourDesc5: Use the **search bar** to quickly find by name, SKU or IMEI. Filters help view by **category**, **branch**, **product type** or **stock status**.
inventory.tourDesc6: The **"Warranty Items"** tab tracks defective items. The **"Stock Count"** tab helps reconcile actual vs system quantities periodically. That's it! 🎊
inventory.noInventoryDataDesc: No products yet or no results match the filter

importNew.tourDesc1: This is where you create **new import receipts**. Follow each step to import your first product!
importNew.tourDesc2: Scroll up, select **branch** and **supplier**. If no supplier yet, click the **"+"** button to create one. Then click "Next" here.
importNew.tourDesc3: Enter: **Product name** → **SKU** (click A→ to copy name) → **IMEI** (if any) → Select **category** → **Import price**. Fields with * are required. When done click "Next".
importNew.tourDesc4: Scroll down and click the green **"Add to Cart"** button to add the product to the **import cart**.
importNew.tourDesc5: After adding products, scroll to **"Import Cart"** → click **"Pay"** to complete the receipt. Happy importing! 🎊
importNew.pageDesc: Import goods manually or from Excel
importNew.pageHelp: Create a new import receipt by adding products manually or importing from Excel. Select supplier, enter IMEI/serial for each product, then pay to complete.
importNew.searchOrAddProduct: Enter product name to search or add new
importNew.searchHint: Search existing products in stock or add new ones.
importNew.skuHint: Product name abbreviation for easy recall and search.
importNew.skuHintBtn: You can copy the product name down (click the **A→** button)
importNew.imeiHint: Only enter for devices with **IMEI** or **Serial** (phones, laptops, cameras…).
importNew.imeiHintAccessory: If it's an accessory (cable, charger, parts, other products…) → **not** needed.
importNew.quantityImeiHint: Devices with **IMEI / Serial** → default 1 (each unit has unique code).
importNew.quantityNonImeiHint: Accessories **without** IMEI / Serial → can import in bulk.
importNew.notePlaceholder: e.g., battery 95%, 300 charges, no Face ID...
importNew.noteHint: Note specific product condition for easier consulting (e.g., battery 95%, 300 charges, no Face ID...)
importNew.imeiDuplicateCartDesc: IMEI "{{imei}}" already added to import cart
importNew.addProductsFirst: Please add products to cart before paying
importNew.importSuccessDesc: Imported {{count}} products with total value {{total}} VND
importNew.importErrorRetry: Cannot create import receipt. Please try again.

exportNew.tourDesc1: This is where you create **sales receipts**. Let's learn the basic steps.
exportNew.tourDesc2: Click the **scan barcode** button next to the search box to open camera and scan **IMEI/SKU**. Products are auto-added to cart.
exportNew.tourDesc3: No barcode? Search products by **IMEI** or **name**, enter **sale price** then add to cart.
exportNew.tourDesc4: View selected products list, enter **customer info**, then click **"Pay"** to complete.
exportNew.tourDesc5: You've got the workflow. Start **scanning** or **searching products** to create your first sale!
exportNew.pageHelp: Create a sales receipt by scanning barcodes or searching products. Select customers, apply discounts, then pay and print invoices.
exportNew.searchHint: **IMEI/Serial:** Enter exact code → Enter → product appears | **Name:** Type 2-3 chars → suggestions appear
exportNew.scanBarcodeHint: Scan barcode with price → auto-add to cart with warranty below.
exportNew.salesStaffNote: Sales revenue will be attributed to this staff member
exportNew.cannotSellDesc: This product is in "{{status}}" status and has not been re-imported
exportNew.cannotExportDesc: Product belongs to "{{branch}}". You can only export from your branch. Please request a stock transfer.
exportNew.alreadyInCartDesc: This product is already in the cart
exportNew.enterSalePriceHint: Please enter sale price and click "Add to Cart"
exportNew.enterWarrantyHint: Please enter warranty and click "Add to Cart"
exportNew.errorValidPrice: Please enter a valid sale price
exportNew.emptyCartErrorDesc: Please add products to the cart
exportNew.multiBranchErrorDesc: Receipt cannot contain products from multiple branches: {{branches}}. Please remove products to keep only 1 branch.
exportNew.missingCustomerInfo: Please enter customer name and phone number

namingTip.title: Product naming tip for easy search
namingTip.formula: Formula: Product Name + Model + Storage + Color
